description: Openstack dashboard using the Openstack Exporter (https://github.com/Linaro/openstack-exporter)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  display_name AS metric,
  CASE vm_state 
    WHEN 'active' THEN 1
    WHEN 'stopped' THEN 0
    WHEN 'error' THEN -1
    WHEN 'paused' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END AS value
FROM instances 
WHERE vm_state != 'deleted'
ORDER BY host, display_name

title: 01.OpenStack Dashboard
